headline: Demis Hassabis: 'Foothills of the Singularity.'
summary:
Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis described Google I/O as a "profound moment for humanity."
Hassabis stated Google's AI research could unlock AGI's potential globally.
He suggested current advancements might be the 'foothills of the singularity.'

headline: We react to Google I/O 2026
summary:
The Vergecast provided live reactions to the Google I/O 2026 keynote.
Discussion covered wild details, including a new Gmail bot.
DeepMind's leader's comments on the singularity were also a key topic.

headline: The future of Google is a search box that does everything
summary:
Google I/O 2026 showcased Google's ambition for its search box to do 'everything' for users.
The company aims to integrate more functions directly into the search experience.
This vision expands on previous efforts to have Google 'google for you.'

headline: Nintendo's $500 Switch 2 bundle includes a game, and it's available now
summary:
Nintendo's new 'Choose Your Game' Switch 2 console bundle is now available for $499.99.
Originally teased for early June, retailers are already offering the bundle.
The package includes a digital game, making it an early holiday deal.

headline: Save 30% Off the Bluetti AC70 768Wh 1,000W LiFePO4 Power Station During the AliExpress Memorial Day Sale
summary:
The Bluetti AC70 power station is currently 30% off during the AliExpress Memorial Day Sale.
It features a 768Wh capacity and 1,000W output.
This deal is $80 cheaper than on Amazon, directly from the manufacturer.

headline: Get a 48V 500W Adult Electric Scooter With 22-Mile Range and a Top Speed of 22mph for $165
summary:
An adult electric scooter is available for $165 on AliExpress.
It boasts a 48V 500W motor, a 22-mile range, and a top speed of 22mph.
This deal is highlighted as one of the most powerful e-scooters under $200.

headline: Don't Miss This Phenomenal Price Drop on the FlashForge AD5X Multi-Color 3D Printer at AliExpress
summary:
The FlashForge AD5X multi-color 3D printer is available at a significant price drop on AliExpress.
It's praised as a well-built, feature-rich multi-material 3D printer.
This deal offers the printer for well under $250.

headline: This Iniu 20,000 Power Bank Quadruples Your Nintendo Switch 2 Play Time For Less Than $20
summary:
An Iniu 20,000mAh power bank can quadruple Nintendo Switch 2 play time.
It's available for less than $20 on Amazon.
Users can simultaneously play and charge without battery concerns.

headline: Surrey Police investigating child sex abuse allegations after Epstein files release
summary:
Surrey Police are investigating child sex abuse allegations following the release of Epstein files.
The force confirmed no arrests have been made in connection with the offenses.
The allegations date back to the 1980s and 1990s.

headline: Channel 4 contacted by police after Married at First Sight UK rape claims
summary:
Channel 4 has been contacted by police regarding rape allegations.
The claims emerged from a BBC Panorama investigation into Married at First Sight UK.
Allegations suggest two women were raped during the show's filming.

headline: Twenty-two years in the making - how Arsenal celebrated title win
summary:
Arsenal celebrated their first title win in 22 years on Tuesday night.
Both players and fans savored every moment of the long-awaited victory.
The club's triumph marks a historic achievement after more than two decades.

headline: HS2 could cost up to £102.7bn and trains will be slower than first planned
summary:
The HS2 project's cost estimate has risen to potentially £102.7 billion.
Planned train speeds for the high-speed rail line will be slower than initially projected.
This news comes as the delayed and scaled-back project undergoes a 'reset.'
